subject: IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches HL

topics.name: Sequences & Series
topics.objectives: Understand arithmetic and geometric sequences and series, use sigma notation, and determine convergence
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing common difference and common ratio, forgetting absolute value condition for convergence |r|<1
topics.remediation: Start with pattern recognition in sequences before introducing formal notation and sum formulas

topics.name: Exponents & Logarithms
topics.objectives: Apply laws of exponents and logarithms fluently to simplify expressions and solve equations
topics.common_mistakes: Applying log(a+b) = log(a) + log(b) incorrectly, forgetting domain restrictions for logarithms
topics.remediation: Emphasise that log laws mirror exponent laws; use numerical examples before algebraic manipulation

topics.name: Binomial Theorem
topics.objectives: Expand binomial expressions, find specific terms, and extend to fractional/negative indices at HL
topics.common_mistakes: Off-by-one errors in the general term, forgetting to apply the power to both terms in each term
topics.remediation: Start with Pascal's triangle for small n, then transition to the formula; practise finding specific terms

topics.name: Proofs
topics.objectives: Construct formal proofs using induction, contradiction, and counterexample
topics.common_mistakes: Incomplete induction step (not using the inductive hypothesis), failing to state the base case
topics.remediation: Use a structured template for induction proofs: base case → hypothesis → inductive step → conclusion

topics.name: Complex Numbers
topics.objectives: Perform operations with complex numbers in different forms, apply De Moivre's theorem, find nth roots
topics.common_mistakes: Sign errors when multiplying, confusing argument conventions, forgetting all n roots in nth root problems
topics.remediation: Visualise on the Argand diagram; practise converting between Cartesian and polar forms before De Moivre

topics.name: Systems of Equations
topics.objectives: Solve systems of up to 3 linear equations using row reduction; interpret geometrically
topics.common_mistakes: Arithmetic errors in row operations, misinterpreting infinite solutions as no solution
topics.remediation: Use systematic row reduction and always check the solution by substituting back

topics.name: Functions Basics
topics.objectives: Understand function notation, determine domain/range, form composites, and find inverses
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing f(g(x)) with g(f(x)), forgetting to restrict domain for inverse to exist
topics.remediation: Use mapping diagrams and graphical approaches before algebraic manipulation

topics.name: Quadratics
topics.objectives: Solve quadratic equations using multiple methods, interpret the discriminant, solve quadratic inequalities
topics.common_mistakes: Sign errors in completing the square, forgetting ± in the quadratic formula, wrong direction on inequalities
topics.remediation: Practise all three methods on the same equation; connect the discriminant to the graph visually

topics.name: Rational, Exponential & Log Functions
topics.objectives: Model with exponential and log functions, identify asymptotes, solve graphically and algebraically
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing horizontal and vertical asymptotes, misidentifying growth vs decay
topics.remediation: Sketch by hand first identifying key features (intercepts, asymptotes) then verify with technology

topics.name: Transformations
topics.objectives: Apply and describe transformations of functions using function notation
topics.common_mistakes: Mixing up horizontal vs vertical transformations, getting the direction of horizontal shifts wrong
topics.remediation: Practise by starting with a simple function (e.g. x²) and applying one transformation at a time

topics.name: Functions (AHL)
topics.objectives: Classify functions as odd/even, apply factor/remainder theorems, decompose into partial fractions
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting to check both conditions for even/odd, wrong form for repeated linear factors in partial fractions
topics.remediation: Practise factor theorem to find roots systematically; use cover-up method for partial fractions

topics.name: Measurement & Trigonometry
topics.objectives: Apply sine and cosine rules, work with radians, calculate arc lengths and sector areas
topics.common_mistakes: Using degrees instead of radians, applying sine rule for obtuse angles incorrectly
topics.remediation: Always check calculator mode; draw diagrams for 3D problems to identify the right triangle to use

topics.name: Unit Circle & Identities
topics.objectives: Use the unit circle, recall exact values, apply Pythagorean and double angle identities to solve equations
topics.common_mistakes: Not finding all solutions in a given interval, confusing sin²x + cos²x = 1 variants
topics.remediation: Use the unit circle systematically; always list all solutions in the given domain

topics.name: Circular Functions
topics.objectives: Sketch and transform trig graphs, determine amplitude/period/phase shift, model periodic phenomena
topics.common_mistakes: Errors in reading period from transformed equations, confusing phase shift direction
topics.remediation: Start from the parent function and apply transformations step by step

topics.name: Vectors
topics.objectives: Perform vector operations, find scalar products, write vector equations of lines, determine intersections
topics.common_mistakes: Sign errors in vector subtraction, confusing position vectors with direction vectors
topics.remediation: Draw vector diagrams before computing; practise scalar product calculations with 3D vectors

topics.name: Trig Identities (AHL)
topics.objectives: Derive and apply compound angle formulae, use inverse trig functions, prove identities
topics.common_mistakes: Misapplying compound angle vs double angle formulae, wrong domain for inverse trig functions
topics.remediation: Derive double angle from compound angle each time; practise working with restricted domains

topics.name: Vector Applications
topics.objectives: Compute cross products, find equations of planes, determine intersections of lines and planes
topics.common_mistakes: Errors in cross product calculation (sign pattern), confusing normal vector with direction vector of plane
topics.remediation: Use the determinant method for cross products; practise converting between forms of plane equations

topics.name: Descriptive Statistics
topics.objectives: Collect, organise, and analyse data using statistical measures; interpret correlation and regression
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing population and sample standard deviation, extrapolating beyond data range
topics.remediation: Use technology for calculations but focus on interpreting results in context

topics.name: Probability
topics.objectives: Calculate probabilities of combined events, use conditional probability, understand discrete distributions
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing independent with mutually exclusive, errors in conditional probability (wrong denominator)
topics.remediation: Always draw Venn diagrams or tree diagrams; identify whether events are independent or dependent first

topics.name: Distributions
topics.objectives: Apply binomial and normal distributions, standardise values, find probabilities and quantiles
topics.common_mistakes: Using normal approximation when np is too small, continuity correction errors
topics.remediation: Practise identifying when to use binomial vs normal; always state parameters before calculating

topics.name: Statistics (AHL)
topics.objectives: Apply Bayes' theorem, work with continuous distributions, perform hypothesis tests
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing null and alternative hypotheses, wrong degrees of freedom in chi-squared
topics.remediation: Follow a structured hypothesis testing procedure; practise Bayes' theorem with tree diagrams

topics.name: Limits & Derivatives
topics.objectives: Understand limits informally, differentiate using standard rules, find tangent and normal lines
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting chain rule on composite functions, sign errors in the quotient rule
topics.remediation: Practise identifying which rule applies before computing; show substitution steps clearly

topics.name: Differentiation Applications
topics.objectives: Apply differentiation to find stationary points, solve optimisation and related rates problems
topics.common_mistakes: Not verifying nature of stationary points, setting up the wrong expression to optimise
topics.remediation: Practise translating word problems into a function of one variable before differentiating

topics.name: Integration Basics
topics.objectives: Integrate standard functions, evaluate definite integrals, find areas, apply to kinematics
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting +C for indefinite integrals, wrong limits or signs when area is below x-axis
topics.remediation: Always check by differentiating; sketch curves and identify regions before integrating

topics.name: Calculus Applications
topics.objectives: Apply calculus to model real-world situations involving rates of change and accumulation
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing when to differentiate vs integrate, not checking units or boundary conditions
topics.remediation: Start from the physical context — identify what changes and what accumulates

topics.name: Calculus AHL: Differentiation
subtopics: Derivatives of trig, exponential, log functions
topics.objectives: Differentiate transcendental functions, use implicit differentiation and L'Hôpital's rule
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting to differentiate both sides in implicit differentiation, misapplying L'Hôpital's rule to non-indeterminate forms
topics.remediation: Practise chain rule with transcendental functions; verify L'Hôpital conditions before applying

topics.name: Calculus AHL: Integration
topics.objectives: Apply advanced integration techniques and calculate volumes of revolution
topics.common_mistakes: Wrong substitution choice, forgetting to change limits when substituting, integration by parts sign errors
topics.remediation: Use LIATE rule for choosing u in by-parts; practise recognising common substitution patterns

topics.name: Differential Equations
topics.objectives: Solve separable differential equations, interpret slope fields, apply Euler's method
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting the constant of integration when separating variables, errors in Euler's method step calculations
topics.remediation: Practise the separation and integration steps systematically; draw slope fields to build intuition
